title: An Ontology-Guided Multi-Anchor Graph Retrieval Framework for Traffic Legal Liability Determination
summary: Traffic law liability determination is critical for assigning legal penalties, requiring the simultaneous identification of interdependent statutory provisions across multiple legal dimensions. However, existing retrieval-augmented generation methods suffer from a multi-dimensional retrieval bottleneck: single axis architectures compress complex legal queries into a single pathway, causing interdependent statutory dimensions to be overlooked. To address this, we propose OMAGR, an ontology-guided framework that decomposes queries into ontology-aligned anchors and executes parallel graph retrieval across each dimension, ensuring independent retrieval across dimensions before fusion. To evaluate the proposed method, we created the TrafficLaw-QA dataset, an expert-validated benchmark dataset containing 200 questions and 527 legal provisions. Results show that TrafficOmni-RAG outperforms baselines on Context Precision and Faithfulness metrics. The findings demonstrate that parallel multi-anchor retrieval effectively resolves the multi-dimensional retrieval bottleneck, offering a promising direction for traffic law liability determination research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OMAGR，一种本体引导的并行多锚点检索框架，用于解决交通法责任认定中的多维度检索瓶颈，在TrafficLaw-QA数据集上提升了上下文精确度和忠实度。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法因单轴架构而忽略多维度相互依赖的法定条款，导致检索瓶颈。
AI.method: OMAGR通过本体引导将查询分解为多个锚点，并在每个维度上执行并行图检索，最后融合结果。
AI.result: 在TrafficLaw-QA数据集上，TrafficOmni-RAG在上下文精确度和忠实度指标上优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 并行多锚点检索有效解决了多维度检索瓶颈，为交通法责任认定研究提供了新方向。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出一种本体引导的多锚点图检索框架（OMAGR），用于解决交通事故法律责任认定中的多维检索瓶颈。该框架将查询分解为与本体对齐的多个锚点，并行执行图检索，确保每个法律维度独立贡献证据。实验基于新构建的TrafficLaw-QA基准数据集，结果表明TrafficOmni-RAG在上下文精度和忠实度上优于基线方法。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 提出OMAGR框架，通过并行多锚点图检索解决多维检索挑战；2. 构建TrafficLaw-QA基准数据集，用于多维法律检索评估；3. 实验证明TrafficOmni-RAG在上下文精度和忠实度上显著优于基线方法。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 方法包括两个阶段：离线阶段构建基于六维交通法本体的知识图谱，包含527条法律条文；在线阶段执行OMAGR框架：先使用约束LLM解析查询，提取场景、违法类型、当事人、责任四个锚点，并行执行图检索，同时结合查询扩展、密集检索和两跳关系扩展增强召回，通过倒数排名融合（RRF）合并证据，经交叉编码器重排序和最大边际相关性（MMR）去重后，生成器基于精选证据生成带有引用的答案。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 锚点提取质量有限，存在遗漏导致不可恢复的检索盲点；2. 固定两跳扩展半径，对于需要多跳推理的案例覆盖不足；3. 仅聚焦于中国交通法，跨司法管辖区的泛化性未验证。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作有效克服了单轴检索架构在多维度法律问题上的局限性，通过并行多锚点检索确保了各法律维度独立贡献证据，显著提升了法律问答系统的上下文精度和可信度，为交通法律责任认定研究提供了新方向，并推动了法律领域中检索增强生成技术的发展。

title: The Structural Attention Tax: How Retrieval Format Hijacks In-Context Learning Independent of Content
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems inject external knowledge to improve LLM outputs, yet the format of injected content -- distinct from its semantic relevance -- can independently distort the model's attention distribution. We identify and formalise a phenomenon we term the structural attention tax: knowledge graph (KG) triples, due to their relational delimiters and repeated slot patterns, capture 2-3x more attention per token than semantically equivalent natural-language text ($\hat{o}$(KG) $\approx$ 0.70 vs. $\hat{o}$(neutral) $\approx$ 0.25), compressing demonstration attention by up to 42% -- regardless of whether the triples are relevant or noise. We develop a formal framework decomposing attention scores into semantic and structural components (Eq. 2), derive a compression bound (Proposition 1) connecting token-level format bias to demonstration attention loss, and show that the structural term governs how much attention is diverted while the semantic term governs whether this helps or hurts. This decoupling reveals two orthogonal axes for improving retrieval-augmented ICL: optimising retrieval quality (semantic axis) and reducing format-driven attention capture (structural axis). Empirically, across two model families (Mistral-7B, LLaMA-3-8B) and three QA benchmarks, we observe that source-task alignment dominates: task-matched BM25 retrieval achieves 58-62% on HotpotQA vs. ConceptNet's 25-27%, a >30 pp gap that dwarfs all gating strategies ($\leq$2 pp). We derive five structure-aware mitigation strategies from the framework, ranging from zero-cost prompt modifications to training-time regularisation; format flattening (S3) is validated by both accuracy and attention-level evidence from a verbalized-triple control, while structural dispersal (S1) yields mixed results that illuminate the challenges of format-level intervention.

AI.tldr: RAG系统中，知识图谱三元组的格式结构会额外吸引模型注意力，导致演示注意力被压缩，提出解耦语义和结构轴的两阶段改进方法，并验证了多种缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统仅关注注入内容的语义相关性，但格式本身会独立扭曲注意力分布，造成结构注意力税现象。
AI.method: 通过形式化框架将注意力分数分解为语义和结构成分（Eq.2），推导注意力压缩界的理论命题（Proposition 1），并在Mistral-7B和LLaMA-3-8B模型上针对HotpotQA等基准进行实验，比较BM25检索与ConceptNet等对比。
AI.result: 知识图谱三元组每token获得的注意力比自然语言高2-3倍（0.70 vs 0.25），压缩演示注意力达42%。任务匹配的BM25检索达到58-62%准确率，而ConceptNet仅25-27%，差距超过30个百分点，远大于各种门控策略的影响（≤2个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强ICL存在正交的两个改进轴：语义轴优化检索质量，结构轴减少格式驱动的注意力捕获。由此衍生五种结构感知缓解策略，其中格式扁平化（S3）经实验验证有效，而结构分散（S1）效果不一，揭示了格式层面干预的挑战。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出并形式化了“结构注意力税”现象：在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中，知识图谱三元组因其关系分隔符和重复的槽位模式，会独立于语义内容捕获过多的注意力（每token注意力是中性文本的2-3倍），从而压缩演示示例的注意力（最高达42%）。作者构建了注意力分解框架，将注意力分为语义和结构分量，并推导了压缩界；通过两个模型（Mistral-7B, LLaMA-3-8B）和三个QA基准的实验验证了格式驱动的注意力捕获与内容无关，并发现源-任务对齐（语义轴）主导性能，而门控策略效果甚微。基于框架提出了五种结构感知缓解策略，其中格式扁平化（S3）得到实证支持，而结构分散（S1）效果因模型而异。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 提出结构注意力税框架，形式化分解注意力为语义和结构分量，证明结构分量独立于内容决定注意力转移幅度。
2. 通过七条件实验在Mistral-7B和LLaMA-3-8B上验证了格式驱动捕获：噪声三元组与相关三元组的注意力模式几乎一致，证明结构税存在。
3. 发现源-任务对齐效果显著（HotpotQA上BM25检索精度达58-62%，而ConceptNet仅25-27%，差距>30pp），远优于门控策略（≤2pp）。
4. 提出五种结构感知缓解策略，包括格式扁平化（S3，受支持）和结构分散（S1，效果混合），其余为数学推导但未测试。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 实验设计：控制提示结构为[指令;演示;知识;问题]，设置七个条件：C1（标准ICL）、C2（相关KG三元组）、C3（噪声三元组）、C4（标量门控）、C5（中性文本）、C5b（口语化三元组）、C6（多特征门控）、C7（BM25维基百科段落，仅HotpotQA）。模型：Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1和LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct，4-bit NF4量化，贪婪解码。数据集：CommonsenseQA（五选一）、HotpotQA（多跳）、TriviaQA（开放域事实），基础样本n=200，扩展至n=1000用于McNemar检验。指标：精确匹配准确率、首token log概率作为置信度代理。
fulltext_AI.limitations:
1. 统计效力不足：六项Bonferroni校正比较中仅一项显著，置信依赖模式仅为方向性趋势。
2. 检索方法局限：ConceptNet仅用余弦相似度，BM25仅在HotpotQA上评估。
3. 模型规模有限：仅测试7B/8B模型，且使用4-bit量化（FP16在HotpotQA C1上高10pp），采用贪心解码。
4. 注意力分析仅限于最后一层且为相关性而非因果性。
5. 理论假设简单：分解为加法形式，未考虑交互。
6. 缓解策略中仅S3和S1经实证，其余未测试。
7. 普适性仅针对KG三元组格式。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作揭示了RAG中一个被忽视的格式驱动成本，将注意力竞争分解为语义和结构两个正交维度，为理解检索增强ICL提供了新视角。结构注意力税的存在说明即使内容相关，格式不当也会损害性能，这促使研究者在关注检索质量（语义轴）的同时，也应致力于减少格式驱动的注意力捕获（结构轴）。框架导出的缓解策略（如格式扁平化）可零成本应用，为提高RAG系统鲁棒性提供了实用指导。此外，该发现可能推广至其他结构化格式（如SQL、JSON），具有广泛意义。

title: uva-irlab-conv at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Multi-Turn RAG with Learned Sparse Retrieval and Listwise Reranking
comment: SemEval-2026, The 20th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation, collocated with ACL 2026, 9 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables
summary: This report describes our participation in SemEval-2026 Task 8 on multi-turn retrieval and question answering. The task evaluates conversational systems across four domains (finance, cloud documentation, government, Wikipedia), and includes unanswerable queries where the available collection does not contain sufficient evidence to produce a complete response. We propose a multi-turn retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that combines learned sparse retrieval with LLM-based reranking and generation. Using sparse retrieval as the primary retrieval method, we leverage its strong generalization across domains. In addition, we make use of the long-context capabilities of LLMs for conversational query rewriting, pointwise and listwise reranking, and generating the final response, each conditioned on the full conversational history. This multi-step design enables effective integration of conversational context throughout retrieval and generation, improving robustness across domains.

AI.tldr: 提出多轮检索增强生成管道，结合稀疏检索与LLM重排序和生成，用于多领域会话问答。
AI.motivation: 解决多轮检索问答任务中的跨领域泛化和不可回答查询问题，提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用学习型稀疏检索作为主要检索方法，结合LLM进行查询重写、点wise和listwise重排序以及最终响应生成，每一步均利用完整会话历史。
AI.result: 通过多步设计有效整合会话上下文，提高了跨领域鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多步骤RAG管道能有效处理多轮对话中的检索和生成，尤其适用于多领域场景。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出了一种面向多轮对话检索增强生成（RAG）的级联管道，结合了基于LLM的查询改写、学习型稀疏检索（LION-SP-8B）、逐点重排序（Qwen3-Reranker-8B）、列表式重排序（GPT-4.1）以及最终答案生成。系统在SemEval-2026任务8的检索子任务中排名第二（nDCG@5=0.5475），但在生成子任务中表现一般。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
有效利用学习型稀疏检索和级联重排序提升多轮对话检索性能，检索排名第二
通过LLM查询改写和全对话上下文的列表式重排序，将对话上下文整合到检索和生成的各个环节
在多个领域（金融、云文档、政府、维基百科）上展现出较强的跨领域泛化能力
生成答案具有高忠实度（RL_F高），即使在不可回答问题上也避免引入未支持信息
分析了检索性能与生成质量之间的正相关关系
fulltext_AI.method_details: 多阶段RAG管道：1) 查询改写：使用GPT-4.1将最后一轮用户话语改写为独立查询；2) 第一阶段检索：采用LION-SP-8B稀疏检索器，从全集合中检索前1000个段落；3) 逐点重排序：使用Qwen3-Reranker-8B将候选集缩减至前20；4) 列表式重排序：基于GPT-4.1，结合完整对话历史对前20个段落进行列表式重排序，输出前10；5) 答案生成：基于前5个段落和完整对话历史，使用GPT-4.1零样本生成答案。所有组件零样本使用，仅在MS MARCO上训练的检索模型未针对任务领域微调。
fulltext_AI.limitations:
生成性能较低（任务B第23/26，任务C第20/29），主要因为未显式建模不可回答场景
列表式重排序在nDCG@5上的提升有限，主要改善nDCG@1
系统未使用查询分解或自反思等更高级的RAG技术
金融领域（FiQA）检索性能显著低于其他领域
生成质量随对话轮次增加而下降
系统依赖GPT-4.1，可能存在可重复性和成本问题
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作展示了学习型稀疏检索在多轮对话RAG中的有效性，提供了与密集检索和LLM重排序相结合的竞争基线。其系统性消融和跨领域分析揭示了检索与生成的关联，以及忠实度与检索指标解耦的特性，为未来对话信息系统设计提供了重要参考。

title: When More Documents Hurt RAG: Mitigating Vector Search Dilution with Domain-Scoped, Model-Agnostic Retrieval
comment: 24 pages, 8 figures, 30 tables. Preprint under review
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation degrades when scaled to large, heterogeneous document collections, where dense similarity loses discriminative power, and top-k retrieval increasingly returns semantically similar but contextually incorrect chunks. We refer to this failure mode as vector search dilution. Even when using hybrid dense+sparse retrieval, we observed this firsthand in a deployed Wyoming Department of Transportation corpus, where scaling from 54 to 1,128 documents (88,907 chunks) reduced accuracy from 75% to below 40%. To address this dilution, we propose MASDR-RAG ( Multi-Agent Scoped Domain Retrieval for RAG) and evaluate it on 200 expert-validated queries across five LLM backbones, six corpora, and two index stacks. Our results indicate that domain scoping using organizational metadata is the key fix, significantly improving P@10 from 0.77 to 0.86 ($p < 0.05$). Furthermore, our investigation of multi-agent orchestration revealed that a high degree of configuration dependence results --creating what we call the precision-faithfulness paradox. Based on these varied outcomes, our practical recommendation is simple: scope first, then perform a single synthesis call, reserving full multi-agent orchestration for genuinely multi-domain corpora paired with native-tool-call backbones. Code and Data will be made public upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: MASDR-RAG通过域范围划分显著提升检索增强生成在大型异构文档集合中的性能，并揭示了精度-忠实度悖论。
AI.motivation: 检索增强生成在大型异构文档集合中因向量搜索稀释导致性能严重下降，例如在怀俄明州交通运输部语料库中，文档数量从54增至1128时准确率从75%降至40%以下。
AI.method: 提出MASDR-RAG（Multi-Agent Scoped Domain Retrieval for RAG），利用组织元数据进行域范围划分，并结合多代理编排进行检索与生成。
AI.result: 域范围划分将P@10从0.77提升至0.86（p<0.05）；多代理编排展现出高度的配置依赖性，并产生精度-忠实度悖论。
AI.conclusion: 实际建议优先进行域范围划分，然后执行单次合成调用；仅在多领域语料库且使用原生工具调用后端时才采用多代理编排。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出向量搜索稀释问题，即在大型异构文档库中，稠密检索的区分力下降，导致检索结果语义相似但上下文不相关。为解决此问题，提出了MASDR-RAG框架，通过基于组织元数据的域限定检索来缓解稀释，并对比了多智能体编排的效果。实验表明，域限定是提升检索精度的关键，而多智能体编排在商业模型下会导致忠诚度下降，出现精确-忠诚悖论。作者建议优先进行域限定，然后进行单次合成调用。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 形式化定义了向量搜索稀释问题，并给出度量δ。2. 提出了多智能体域限定检索框架MASDR-RAG及其轻量变体Hybrid-Routed，并通过消融实验隔离了合成失败的原因。3. 在5种LLM、6个语料库和2种索引栈上进行了广泛评估，表明结果具有鲁棒性，且相比迭代ReAct基线降低了成本。
fulltext_AI.method_details: MASDR-RAG包含三个组件：(1)域限定检索：每个智能体将搜索限制在Neo4j图中文档元数据过滤后的子集，减少85-98%的搜索空间。(2)混合路由：先使用正则匹配，若失败则回退到LLM零样本分类器。(3)多智能体编排：通过函数调用分发到9个域智能体，使用最多5轮工具调用；Hybrid-Routed仅需一次路由和一次合成调用。域限定基于文档类别（如标准规范、设计手册等）。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 多智能体编排在商业LLM（如Gemini）下导致忠诚度显著下降（从0.61降至0.35），但在开源模型中未复现，表明存在配置依赖性。此外，域限定依赖组织元数据的存在，对于缺乏结构化元数据的语料库可能不适用。实验仅基于WYDOT语料库，泛化性需进一步验证。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作揭示了RAG系统在大规模异构文档库中性能下降的关键原因——向量搜索稀释，并提出了简单有效的域限定解决方案。这为实际企业级RAG系统的设计提供了重要指导：优先进行域限定检索，而非依赖复杂的多智能体编排，从而在保持高召回的同时避免忠诚度下降。

title: APEX: Automated Prompt Engineering eXpert with Dynamic Data Selection
summary: Large Language Models are highly sensitive to prompt formulation, necessitating automatic prompt optimization to unlock their full potential. While evolutionary algorithms have emerged as the dominant paradigm, they suffer from a critical bottleneck: data efficiency. Current methods treat the development dataset as a static benchmark, wasting significant compute budget on uninformative data. In this work, we introduce APEX (Automatic Prompt Engineering eXpert), a novel framework that optimizes the data usage alongside the prompt search. APEX dynamically stratifies the dataset into Easy, Hard, and Mixed tiers based on the optimization lineage. By prioritizing the Mixed tier, which identifies the data where the LLM has mixed performance, we identify two high-leverage subsets: the addressable frontier for generating informative mutations and the rank-sensitive frontier for distinguishing candidate quality. We evaluate APEX across three diverse benchmarks: IFBench, SimpleQA Verified, and FACTS Grounding. Under a fixed budget of 5,000 evaluation calls, due to its data efficiency, APEX outperforms the initial prompt by an average of 11.2% on Gemini 2.5 Flash and 6.8% on Gemma 3 27B, demonstrating that a data-centric approach is key to efficient and effective prompt optimization.

AI.tldr: APEX通过动态数据分层和优先级处理混合层来提升提示优化的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 当前进化算法优化提示时数据效率低，将开发数据集视为静态基准，浪费计算预算。
AI.method: APEX框架动态将数据集分层为Easy、Hard和Mixed，优先Mixed层，并识别可寻址边界和排名敏感边界以生成突变和区分候选质量。
AI.result: 在IFBench、SimpleQA Verified和FACTS Grounding基准上，固定5000次评估调用，APEX在Gemini 2.5 Flash上平均提升11.2%，在Gemma 3 27B上提升6.8%。
AI.conclusion: 以数据为中心的方法是高效有效提示优化的关键。

fulltext_AI.summary: APEX is a data-efficient framework for automated prompt optimization that dynamically stratifies the development dataset into Easy, Hard, and Mixed tiers based on prompt performance history. By focusing compute on the Mixed tier—which contains the addressable frontier for mutation and the rank-sensitive frontier for selection—APEX maximizes optimization signal per evaluation call. Under a fixed budget of 5,000 evaluation calls, APEX achieves average improvements of 11.2% on Gemini 2.5 Flash and 6.8% on Gemma 3 27B across IFBench, SimpleQA Verified, and FACTS Grounding benchmarks.
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
Identify the data efficiency bottleneck in genetic prompt optimization caused by static treatment of dynamic data signals.
Propose APEX with dynamic data stratification and targeting of Addressable and Rank-Sensitive frontiers.
Demonstrate consistent performance gains over baselines on three diverse benchmarks under fixed compute budget.
fulltext_AI.method_details: APEX tracks a lineage of prompt performance over a lookback window to categorize each datapoint as Easy (always passed), Hard (always failed), or Mixed (fluctuating). Mutation samples unvisited errors from Mixed-Fail and Hard buckets to focus on addressable failures. Selection constructs an evaluation set prioritizing Mixed-Unkown datapoints, then uses stratified sampling guided by an annealing anchor ratio to balance positive and negative examples. Incremental evaluation reuses cached results to minimize overhead. The anchor ratio α grows when a prompt update succeeds, gradually stabilizing the evaluation set.
fulltext_AI.limitations: Performance gains are limited when the LLM has fundamental knowledge deficits (e.g., Gemma 3 27B on SimpleQA Verified). The method relies on binary pass/fail evaluation, which may discard partial credit. Hyperparameters (lookback window, anchor ratio schedule) may require tuning for different tasks. The framework assumes a fixed evaluation budget and does not explore adaptive budget allocation across iterations. Scalability to very large datasets or multi-objective optimization is not extensively analyzed.
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: APEX shifts the focus from improving search algorithms to optimizing data usage, demonstrating that dynamic data curation is key to efficient black-box optimization. It achieves superior performance under identical compute budgets, offering a practical solution for real-world prompt engineering. The principle of evolving data alongside candidates has broader implications for agent optimization and any iterative black-box refinement process.

title: EverydayGPT: Confidence-Gated Routing for Efficient and Safe Hybrid GPT-RAG Conversational QA
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, 6 tables. Code and evaluation scripts available at: this https URL . This paper studies routing strategies for hybrid GPT-RAG systems under resource constraints, focusing on efficiency-safety tradeoffs rather than state-of-the-art accuracy
summary: Standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines route every query through retrieval and generation unconditionally, incurring unnecessary computation and propagating low-quality context to the generator. We introduce EverydayGPT, a lightweight conversational QA system built around a Confidence-Gated Routing (CGR) mechanism that formalises the routing decision as a joint policy over retrieval distance and extraction adequacy. The backbone is a 205M-parameter GPT trained from scratch on 10B tokens of FineWeb-Edu. CGR avoids invoking the costly GPT pathway (~5.9s) for 85 percent of queries by resolving them via fast RAG extraction (~45 ms), yielding over 120x latency reduction on the majority of queries while maintaining answer quality. On a 500-question in-domain benchmark, the system achieves F1 = 0.226 +/- 0.004 compared to 0.171 for GPT-only and 0.210 for unconditional RAG. Gains over strong baselines are modest but consistent, while efficiency improvements are substantial (6.3x mean latency reduction). A structured grounding audit finds no unsupported claims in the sampled set, with explicit scope limitations. We position this work as a study of routing strategies under resource constraints rather than a claim of state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: EverydayGPT通过置信门控路由机制，对85%的查询使用快速RAG提取，大幅降低延迟的同时保持答案质量。
AI.motivation: 标准RAG无条件地对每个查询进行检索和生成，导致不必要的计算和低质量上下文。
AI.method: 提出Confidence-Gated Routing (CGR)机制，将路由决策形式化为检索距离和提取充分性的联合策略；骨干为在FineWeb-Edu上训练的205M参数GPT。
AI.result: 在500问题基准上F1=0.226，优于GPT-only的0.171和无条件RAG的0.210；平均延迟降低6.3倍，主流查询延迟降低120倍以上；结构化审计未发现无根据声明。
AI.conclusion: 本工作是资源约束下路由策略的研究，而非声称最先进性能。

fulltext_AI.summary: 提出EverydayGPT，一个基于置信度门控路由（CGR）的混合GPT-RAG对话问答系统。CGR在推理时根据检索距离和提取置信度联合决策，将查询路由至RAG、GPT或拒绝，从而在保证回答质量的同时大幅降低延迟（85%查询使用RAG路径，延迟降低120倍以上）。系统基于自训练的205M参数GPT和FAISS密集检索，在500问题基准上F1=0.226，优于纯GPT和无条件RAG基线，且支持CPU运行。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: C1: 形式化定义的三路路由策略π: Q×D → {rag, gpt, refuse}，基于检索距离和提取置信度的联合决策，区别于输出层弃权和仅距离过滤。C2: 自训练的205M参数GPT（基于FineWeb-Edu，10B tokens），在WikiText-103和PTB上优于GPT-2 Small。C3: 与8个基线对比，含bootstrap置信区间、Wilcoxon检验、阈值敏感性分析、接地审计和域外评估。C4: 完整CPU可运行系统（<2GB内存，<6秒延迟），代码和评估基础设施开源。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 系统由GPT骨干（205M参数，18层，768维，Pre-LN，GELU，token窗口512）、FAISS密集检索（all-MiniLM-L6-v2，384维，IndexFlatL2，top-10）和CGR路由组成。路由策略：若最小检索距离d_min > δ（1.5）则拒绝；若d_min ≤ δ且提取置信度c ≥ τ（0.5）则输出RAG答案；若d_min ≤ 1.0且c < τ则调用GPT生成；否则拒绝。置信度c = min(1.0, |w|/25*0.3 + overlap(q,a)*0.4 + η*0.3)，其中η为类型正确性奖励。GPT预训练使用AdamW（lr=1e-4，余弦衰减，500预热步），batch 32，梯度累积×4，在NVIDIA Tesla P4上训练48-72小时。推理使用top-k采样（k=50，τ=0.4）和3-gram重复检测。
fulltext_AI.limitations: (1) 受硬件限制未与大型模型对比（如GPT-4、Llama）。 (2) 置信度分数为加权启发式，非校准概率，未使用学习估计器。 (3) 不支持多跳合成。 (4) 接地审计仅针对域内样本（300条），统计效力有限，不可泛化为无幻觉保证。 (5) 域外评估F1增益较小，需更广泛评估。 (6) 检索边界附近错误和错误拒绝表明需联合调优(δ, τ)及重排序。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 提出效率-安全架构：CGR在生成前决策，避免无效计算，提供明确拒绝路径，适合资源受限部署场景。相比无条件生成，延迟降低6.3倍；相比标准RAG管道，增加路由策略以丢弃低质量上下文。贡献在于路由设计本身而非精度大幅提升，为低资源场景提供实用方案。

title: Soft-Prompt Tuning for Fair and Efficient LLM Benchmark Evaluation
summary: Benchmark scores often misrepresent a large language model's (LLM's) knowledge, because they rely, e.g., on the model's ability to follow specific formatting requirements. This especially penalizes base models that may know the correct answers but lack the ability -- typically introduced in post-training -- to structure them as instructed. To overcome this, we propose soft-prompt tuning, an efficient, fair, and architecture-agnostic model evaluation. By optimizing only 10 soft-prompt vectors (roughly 0.0006% parameters for a 7B model) over a short tuning period, we adapt models to specific benchmark formats, closing gaps in format-following and ensuring that underlying knowledge is accurately reflected in benchmark scores. This allows one to fairly compare different base models -- trained with various pre-training recipes -- on benchmarks without the need for full post-training. We evaluated soft-prompt tuning across 7 models and 7 datasets. The results show that (a) soft-prompt tuning saturates format-following within 80 steps (~640 samples) making it highly efficient, (b) soft-prompt tuning significantly outperforms zero- and few-shot prompting, surfacing base model knowledge that standard prompting misses, that (c) even post-trained models can benefit from soft-prompts to maximize format compliance, and that (d) soft-prompted base model performance predicts post-trained model rankings more reliably than zero- and few-shot baselines, offering a low-cost proxy for downstream model quality. Our contributions include (1) metrics which disentangle format-following and knowledge accuracy, (2) a fairer benchmarking protocol of LLM knowledge, and (3) a cost- and memory-effective recipe to identify optimal pre-training strategies early in LLM development.

AI.tldr: 提出软提示调优（soft-prompt tuning）作为LLM知识评估的公平方法，通过优化少量软提示向量使模型适应基准格式，从而更准确反映基础模型的知识，无需完整后训练。
AI.motivation: 基准测试分数因格式遵循要求而误判LLM知识，尤其惩罚基础模型；现有评估未能有效区分格式遵循与知识准确性。
AI.method: 使用软提示调优，仅优化10个软提示向量（0.0006%参数）在80步内，使模型适应基准测试格式，并在7个模型和7个数据集上评估。
AI.result: (a) 软提示调优在80步内饱和格式遵循；(b) 显著优于零样本和少样本提示；(c) 后训练模型也能受益；(d) 软提示基座模型性能更可靠地预测后训练模型排名。
AI.conclusion: 贡献包括：区分格式遵循和知识准确度的指标、更公平的LLM知识基准协议、以及成本有效的早期预训练策略选择方法。

fulltext_AI.summary: 论文提出软提示调优（soft-prompt tuning）方法，用于公平高效地评估大型语言模型（LLM）的基准性能。通过优化仅10个软提示向量（约占7B模型参数的0.0006%），在80步内使模型适应基准格式，从而解耦格式遵循与知识准确度，使基础模型的知识得到准确反映。实验证明该方法能饱和格式遵循而不注入额外知识，且软提示调优的基础模型排名与训练后模型高度一致。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 提出了分离格式遵循准确度和知识准确度的评价指标；2. 提出了基于软提示调优的公平模型评估协议，适用于基础模型和训练后模型；3. 提出了高效的低成本预训练模型选择策略，通过软提示调优的基础模型排名预测训练后模型性能。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 使用L=10个可学习软提示向量，冻结模型参数，仅优化软提示以最大化目标序列的对数似然。调优80步（约640样本），达到格式遵循饱和。实验涵盖7个模型和7个数据集（封闭式与开放式）。封闭式任务用对数似然和精确匹配评估知识与格式；开放式任务用LLM作为评判。排名一致性用冒泡排序交换距离度量。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 开放式任务中LLM评判可能无法完全解耦知识与格式；方法的有效性依赖调优数据质量；在更广泛模型和数据集上需进一步验证；对于训练后模型格式改善有限，基础模型评估可能忽略其他能力。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该方法解决了基准评估中格式遵循与知识能力混淆的问题，使基础模型的能力能够公平评估，无需昂贵的全训练后调优即可预测训练后模型质量，加速预训练配方选择和模型开发，降低计算成本。

title: NightFeats @ MMU-RAGent NeurIPS 2025: A Context-Optimized Multi-Agent RAG System for the Text-to-Text Track
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. NeurIPS 2025 Competition Track (MMU-RAGent). System developed October 2025
summary: We present NightFeats, a structured multi-agent retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system submitted to the MMU-RAGent competition at NeurIPS 2025, where it was awarded Best Dynamic Evaluation in the text-to-text track. Rather than targeting benchmark maximization, this work proposes a principled pipeline that decomposes knowledge synthesis into three coordinated phases: retrieval, curation, and composition, each governed by explicit intermediate representations and handoff contracts. Inspired by Agentic Context Engineering (ACE), the system introduces temporal-semantic reranking, bounded contradiction reconciliation, and citation-preserving composition as core architectural primitives. Competition results show that NightFeats surpasses proprietary baselines including Claude-SonnetV2 and Nova-Pro on LLM-as-a-Judge and Human Likert evaluations, confirming that architectural transparency and verifiable evidence grounding are better aligned with human preferences than systems optimizing narrowly for automatic similarity metrics.

AI.tldr: NightFeats是一个结构化多智能体检索增强生成系统，通过分解知识合成过程并引入核心原语，超越专有基线。
AI.motivation: 设计一个基于原则的管道，而不是追求基准最大化，以实现架构透明和可验证的证据基础，更符合人类偏好。
AI.method: 将知识合成分解为检索、策展和组合三个阶段，引入时间语义重排序、有界矛盾调和和引用保留组合作为核心原语。
AI.result: 在MMU-RAGent竞赛中获得最佳动态评估，超越Claude-SonnetV2和Nova-Pro。
AI.conclusion: 架构透明和可验证的证据基础比优化自动相似度指标的系统更符合人类偏好。

title: BioDivergence: A Benchmark and Evaluation Framework for Hidden Contextual Contradictions in Biomedical Abstracts
summary: Biomedical findings often seem to conflict across studies, but many of these differences are context-dependent rather than true contradictions. Variations in cohort, geography, assay protocol, disease subtype, and clinical setting can make both claims locally valid. Existing NLI and scientific claim-verification benchmarks reduce such cases to entailment, contradiction, or neutral, failing to capture the contextual structure behind divergence. To address this, we introduce BioDivergence, an evaluation framework with a six-class conflict taxonomy, a 13-axis divergence ontology, and four structured outputs per claim pair: conflict type, divergence axes, dominant confounder, and reconciliation explanation. We release BioDivergence-Silver-v1.0, an article-disjoint silver benchmark of 11,865 claim pairs across five biomedical domains, alongside a legacy deduplicated variant for comparison. Results show notable ranking differences between the two variants, with the fine-tuned reference model dropping about 12 points under the article-disjoint setting, while Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 achieves 0.5523 accuracy and 0.3894 contextual-F1 on the 842-example primary test set. BioDivergence offers a more faithful way to distinguish contextual divergence from direct contradiction and to separate article-level memorization from genuine task learning.

AI.tldr: 介绍BioDivergence，一个评估生物医学声明上下文分歧的框架，包含六类冲突分类、13轴本体和结构化输出，并发布相关基准。
AI.motivation: 现有NLI和科学声明验证基准将上下文相关的分歧简化为蕴含、矛盾或中立，未能捕捉其结构。
AI.method: 提出BioDivergence框架，包括六类冲突分类、13轴分歧本体、每个声明对输出冲突类型、分歧轴、主导混杂因素和调和解释；构建了包含11,865个声明对的BioDivergence-Silver-v1.0基准及其去重变体。
AI.result: 在文章不重叠设置下，微调参考模型性能下降约12个百分点，Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3在842个测试样本上达到0.5523准确率和0.3894 contextual-F1。
AI.conclusion: BioDivergence能更忠实地区分上下文分歧与直接矛盾，并分离文章级记忆与真正任务学习。

fulltext_AI.summary: BioDivergence是一个用于生物医学摘要中隐藏上下文矛盾分析的基准和评估框架。它超越简单的矛盾标签，要求模型恢复解释两个声明分歧的上下文结构，包括六类冲突分类、13轴分歧本体和每个声明对的四个主要结构化输出。发布了文章不相交的银标准基准BioDivergence-Silver-v1.0，包含11,865个声明对。实验表明，文章不相交评估改变了模型排名，并将文章记忆与上下文推理分离。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: （1）形式化了上下文矛盾分析任务，超越了平面NLI和声明验证基准；（2）引入了六类冲突分类法和13轴分歧本体，以及四个主要输出（冲突类型、分歧轴、主要混杂因素、调和解释）和一个范围界定的证据提取输出；（3）发布了带有显式泄漏审计和文章不相交分割的银标准基准BioDivergence-Silver-v1.0；（4）证明文章不相交评估会改变模型排名，将文章记忆与上下文推理学习分离，为上下文推理能力提供更可靠的评价。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 任务制定：给定声明对(c_a, c_b)和源摘要(d_a, d_b)，模型必须输出冲突类型（六类）、分歧轴（多标签，13轴）、主要混杂因素（一个轴）和调和解释（自由文本）；另外，可选输出证据跨度（v1.0中限于声明内子串）。基准构建：六阶段管道：语料收集（202,180篇摘要）、归一化、声明提取（527,907个声明）、候选对挖掘（50,000对）、LLM基银标准标注（使用Qwen2.5-72B）、基准打包。使用文章不相交分割（主变体）和成对级分割（遗留变体）。参考模型：BiomedBERT编码器，带有多头交叉注意力和比较特征，然后是多任务预测头（冲突类型、分歧轴、主要混杂因素）。对于调和解释和证据跨度，使用LLM结构化生成。训练目标：联合优化三个任务的损失。
fulltext_AI.limitations: v1.0是银标准标注，不是专家策划，因此标签质量有限；在六类冲突中只有两类可可靠评估，13轴中只有九轴可靠；证据跨度提取任务限于声明内子串，不是抽象级别定位；非Qwen注释器系列敏感性分析显示只有公平的一致性；遗留成对级变体存在显著文章级泄漏；基准仅涵盖生物医学领域，可能不适用于其他领域。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 现有NLI和声明验证基准只提供平面矛盾标签，无法区分直接矛盾和上下文条件分歧，而BioDivergence提供了结构化监督来恢复分歧原因。文章不相交评估防止了文章级泄漏，提供了模型上下文推理能力的更诚实测量。它有助于在下游生物医学NLP系统中开发更好的上下文矛盾推理，并可作为评估透镜来分离记忆和推理。

title: Afrispeech Semantics: Evaluating Audio Semantic Reasoning in Spoken Language Models Across Domains and Accents
summary: Audio language models (ALMs) are increasingly used for speech-based understanding, yet their ability to perform semantic reasoning beyond transcription, Text-to-Audio Retrieval, Captioning, and Question-Answering accuracy remains insufficiently benchmarked. In particular, the effects of accent variation, domain shift, and semantic over-inference on audio reasoning are poorly understood. We evaluate audio language models across five semantic and paralinguistic reasoning tasks: entailment, consistency, plausibility, accent drift, and accent restraint. Collectively, these tasks assess a model's ability to reason over spoken audio as the primary evidence source, including whether a textual hypothesis can be inferred, contradicted, or left undetermined by the audio, whether statements align or conflict with spoken content, whether claims are plausible given the discourse, and whether model predictions remain stable or appropriately constrained across accent variation. These findings highlight critical limitations in current audio reasoning evaluations and hope to provide guidance for more robust and equitable ALM design and assessment

AI.tldr: 评估了音频语言模型在蕴含、一致性、合理性、口音漂移和口音约束五个语义推理任务上的表现，揭示了当前评估的关键局限性。
AI.motivation: 音频语言模型在语义推理方面的能力缺乏全面基准测试，特别是口音变化和领域转移的影响研究不足。
AI.method: 通过五个语义和副语言推理任务（蕴含、一致性、合理性、口音漂移、口音约束）评估音频语言模型。
AI.result: 发现了当前音频推理评估的关键局限性，包括模型在口音变化等情况下稳定性和约束性不足。
AI.conclusion: 希望为更健壮和公平的音频语言模型设计和评估提供指导。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出了一个全面的基准测试，用于评估音频语言模型（ALMs）在多个领域和口音下的语义推理能力，包括蕴涵、一致性、合理性、口音漂移和口音抑制五个任务。通过使用多个非洲口音数据集和人工验证的假设，作者发现当前最先进的模型普遍存在过度蕴涵、领域迁移性能下降以及口音敏感性问题，尤其是在对比学习和下一令牌预测模型中。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 提出了多种任务形式，专门测试模型在发音变化下保持语义的能力，而非依赖上下文先验。
2. 利用LLaMA生成假设，并由人工进行系统验证和修正，确保语义有效性和音频证据的吻合。
3. 在统一的推理协议下基准测试了对比学习和下一令牌预测两类模型，揭示了现有基准无法捕捉的过度蕴涵和口音敏感推理失败模式。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 使用四个非洲口音数据集（AfriSpeech-200, AfriSpeech-General, Afri-Names, Afrispeech-Medical），涵盖不同领域和口音。每个任务定义为音频录音与文本假设之间的关系，包括熵涵（三分类）、一致性（二分类）、合理性（二分类）、口音漂移（评估口音变化下的预测稳定性）和口音抑制（评估模型抑制无关口音线索的能力）。假设生成通过LLaMA进行初始提案，然后由人工标注者通过聆听音频进行验证和修正，确保假设的语义精确性和音频基础。推理协议采用统一方法：对比模型通过相似度分数和阈值映射标签，生成模型通过轻量级语言模型映射输出。
fulltext_AI.limitations:
1. 基准仅涵盖有限的非洲口音和领域，可能无法推广到其他方言、话语类型或低资源语言。
2. 人工验证过程存在主观性，可能遗漏或误分类细微差异。
3. 依赖大型语言模型进行假设生成和标签映射，引入了其自身偏差。
4. 评估仅针对零样本推理，微调或提示策略可能会产生不同结果。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 当前音频语言模型的评估主要关注表面正确性，忽视了语义推理能力。本文通过引入多任务和口音变化，揭示了模型在过度蕴涵、领域迁移和口音敏感性方面的系统失败，表明现有基准严重低估了推理错误。这项工作为设计更健壮和公平的音频语言模型评估提供了指导，强调了在现实多语言、多文化环境中部署前进行细致校准的必要性。

title: Every Act Has Its Price: Compressed Moral Composition in Frontier LLMs
summary: Existing LLM moral benchmarks usually ask which isolated moral act, value, or foundation a model prefers. This is useful but incomplete. Realistic judgments often require a model to combine several moral signals within the same option. We introduce **Moral Trolley Arena**, a two-stage blind ELO benchmark for measuring how LLMs compose moral evidence. The single-scene arena first calibrates individual moral acts from a 229-scenario corpus across five Moral Foundations Theory foundations; the composite arena then combines calibrated acts into two-act moral items over a controlled intensity grid and measures the resulting composite preferences. Across ten frontier models, composite judgments are largely predicted by component act strength, but the relation is consistently compressed rather than simply additive. Models also show non-additive intensity anchoring, bounded foundation-specific residuals after component control, and highly convergent composite preference surfaces across providers. These results suggest that moral audits should measure composition rules for moral evidence, not only rankings over isolated acts.

AI.tldr: 提出了Moral Trolley Arena基准，测量LLM如何组合道德证据。
AI.motivation: 现有基准只测量孤立道德偏好，但现实判断需要组合多种道德信号。
AI.method: 两阶段盲ELO基准：先校准单个道德行为（229场景，五个基础），再组合成双行为项目测量组合偏好。
AI.result: 组合判断由组件强度预测但关系压缩；显示非加性锚定、基础特定残差和收敛偏好。
AI.conclusion: 道德审计应测量组合规则而非仅孤立行为排名。

title: Energy-Efficient On-Device RAG on a Mobile NPU: System Design and Benchmark on Snapdragon X Elite
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines are compute-intensive, combining embedding, retrieval, reranking, and large language model (LLM) generation. Running them entirely on-device benefits privacy, latency, and offline use, but the energy cost of CPU inference is a major barrier. We present what is, to our knowledge, the first end-to-end RAG pipeline that runs all neural stages -- embedding, reranking, and LLM generation -- on the Qualcomm Hexagon NPU of the Snapdragon X Elite. Profiling on a Dell XPS 13 laptop, we compare NPU-accelerated RAG against CPU and OpenCL/Adreno GPU baselines on indexing and query workloads. On indexing, the NPU achieves 9.1x higher embedding throughput and 12.3x less system energy. On a 120-query Wikipedia-passage benchmark, it delivers 18.1x faster LLM prefilling, 4.0x lower end-to-end query latency, and 4.0x less system energy than the CPU baseline; the same workload on the integrated GPU is 1.7x slower than CPU and uses 6.5x more energy than the NPU. A GPT-4.1 LLM-as-judge evaluation finds NPU answer quality on par with CPU and GPU within evaluator noise (mean 9.32 vs. 8.95 vs. 9.03 on a 1-10 rubric), with 86.7% of queries scoring identically across all three backends. On the Snapdragon X Elite / Hexagon class of laptop SoC, the NPU thus enables practical, energy-efficient on-device RAG without quality regression -- a sustainable path toward green edge intelligence that we expect to generalize to comparable mobile NPUs (Apple Neural Engine, Intel NPU, MediaTek APU) as their software stacks mature.

AI.tldr: 首个端到端RAG管道在Hexagon NPU上运行，实现高能效和设备端推理。
AI.motivation: RAG管道计算密集，CPU推理能耗高，阻碍了设备端部署。NPU加速有望解决能耗问题，实现隐私、低延迟和离线使用。
AI.method: 在Snapdragon X Elite的Hexagon NPU上实现包含嵌入、重排序和LLM生成的端到端RAG管道，并在Dell XPS 13上与CPU和GPU基线进行对比评测。
AI.result: 索引时NPU嵌入吞吐量提升9.1倍，系统能耗减少12.3倍；查询时LLM预填充快18.1倍，端到端延迟降低4.0倍，能耗减少4.0倍；答案质量与CPU/GPU相当。
AI.conclusion: 该NPU能够实现节能高效的设备端RAG，且无质量损失，有望推广到其他移动NPU，为绿色边缘智能提供可持续路径。

title: The Periodic Table of LLM Reasoning: A Structured Survey of Reasoning Paradigms, Methods, and Failure Modes
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across natural language processing tasks, yet reliable reasoning remains an open challenge. Although modern LLMs show progress in structured inference, multi-step problem solving, and contextual understanding, their reasoning behavior is often inconsistent and sensitive to prompting strategies, task design, and model scale. This survey provides a systematic analysis of more than 300 recent papers from arXiv, Semantic Scholar, Google Scholar, Papers with Code, and the ACL Anthology to examine how reasoning capabilities emerge in LLMs and where they fail. We make three main contributions. First, we introduce a structured taxonomy of LLM reasoning research, covering Chain-of-Thought reasoning, multi-hop reasoning, mathematical reasoning, common sense reasoning, visual and temporal reasoning, code and algorithmic reasoning, retrieval-augmented reasoning, tool-augmented and agentic reasoning, and reinforcement learning-based reasoning. Second, we analyze methodological trends across these paradigms, including prompting methods, model architectures, training objectives, reward modeling, and evaluation benchmarks. Third, we synthesize recurring limitations and failure modes, such as reasoning hallucinations, brittle multi-step inference, weak causal abstraction, and poor cross-domain generalization. By organizing a rapidly expanding literature, this survey offers a unified view of the current capabilities and limitations of reasoning in LLMs. We also identify emerging research directions, including meta-reasoning, self-evolving reasoning frameworks, multimodal reasoning, and socially grounded reasoning. Overall, this work aims to serve as a reference for developing more robust, interpretable, and generalizable reasoning systems in future language models.

AI.tldr: 对超过300篇论文的系统综述，提出了LLM推理研究的结构化分类，分析了方法论趋势，总结了局限性，并指出了未来方向。
AI.motivation: LLM推理行为不一致且对提示策略、任务设计和模型规模敏感，需要系统分析以理解其能力与失败模式。
AI.method: 系统分析了来自多个来源的300多篇论文，建立涵盖九大推理范式的分类法，并分析了方法论趋势与重复出现的局限性。
AI.result: 提出了结构化分类、方法论趋势分析以及常见限制与失败模式的综合，并识别了新兴研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为开发更稳健、可解释和可泛化的推理系统提供了统一参考框架。

title: Automated Creativity Evaluation of Language Models Across Open-Ended Tasks
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 (Main Conference). 35 pages, 16 figures. Code: this https URL
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in language understanding, reasoning, and generation, sparking growing interest in their creative potential. Realizing this potential requires systematic and scalable methods for evaluating creativity across diverse tasks. However, most existing creativity metrics are tightly coupled to specific tasks, embedding domain assumptions into the evaluation process, and limiting scalability and generality. To address this gap, we introduce an automated, domain-agnostic framework for quantifying LLM creativity across open-ended tasks. Our approach separates the measurement apparatus from the creative task itself, enabling scalable, task-agnostic assessment. Divergent creativity is measured using semantic entropy, a reference-free and robust metric for novelty and diversity, validated against human annotations, LLM-based novelty judgments and baseline diversity measures. Convergent creativity is assessed via a novel retrieval-based multi-agent judge framework that delivers context-sensitive evaluation of task fulfilment with over 60% improved efficiency. We validate our framework in three qualitatively distinct domains: problem-solving (MacGyver), research ideation (HypoGen), and creative writing (BookMIA), using a broad suite of LLMs. Empirical results show that our framework reliably captures key facets of creativity, including novelty, diversity, and task fulfilment, and reveal how model properties, such as size, temperature, recency, and reasoning, impact creative performance. Our work establishes a reproducible and generalizable standard for automated LLM creativity evaluation, paving the way for scalable benchmarking and accelerating progress in creative AI.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自动化、领域无关的框架，通过语义熵和检索式多智能体评判量化LLM的创造力，在三个领域验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有创造力指标与具体任务耦合，限制可扩展性和通用性，需要系统、可扩展的方法。
AI.method: 分离测量装置与任务，发散创造力用语义熵，收敛创造力用检索式多智能体评判框架。
AI.result: 框架可靠地捕捉创新性、多样性和任务履行，模型属性影响创造力表现，效率提升60%以上。
AI.conclusion: 建立可重复、可推广的自动化LLM创造力评估标准，促进可扩展基准测试和创意AI。

title: WorldReasoner: Evaluating Whether Language Model Agents Forecast Events with Valid Reasoning
summary: Forecasting real-world events requires language-model agents to reason under uncertainty from incomplete, time-bounded information. Yet evaluating whether agents genuinely forecast requires more than final-answer accuracy: a model may be correct by recalling memorized training facts, citing fabricated evidence, or producing an unsupported causal story. We present WorldReasoner, an evaluation framework for temporally valid event forecasting. Each task gives an agent a resolved forecasting question, a simulated forecast date, and access only to evidence available before that date; after resolution, the framework scores the submitted probability, cited evidence, and optional causal event graph. WorldReasoner reports three complementary axes: outcome quality against resolved answers, evidence quality over cited sources, and reasoning quality against post-resolution hindsight graphs. The benchmark is built by an agentic construction pipeline that generates forecasting questions, collects time-stamped evidence, and builds hindsight reference graphs at scale, yielding 345 resolved tasks derived from 14,141 articles with graphs covering 8,087 extracted events. Across six controlled agent settings, temporally valid retrieval is the strongest driver of outcome accuracy; causal graph construction improves key-event recovery; and correct graph-enabled forecasts are more strongly grounded in key events and relevant sources, yet agents still struggle to convert grounded evidence into calibrated probabilities.

AI.tldr: WorldReasoner是一个评估语言模型代理在时间约束下进行事件预测的框架，通过结果、证据和推理三个维度衡量，发现时间有效检索是预测准确性的关键，但代理在概率校准方面仍有不足。
AI.motivation: 现有评估仅关注最终答案的准确性，忽略了证据和推理质量，无法真正判断代理是否在合理预测。
AI.method: 提出了WorldReasoner框架，包括三个评估轴：结果质量（与解决答案对比）、证据质量（引用来源）和推理质量（与事后因果图对比）。通过自动构建流程生成345个任务，包含时间戳证据和因果图。
AI.result: 时间有效检索是结果准确性的最强驱动因素；因果图构建改善了关键事件恢复；正确图驱动的预测更依赖于关键事件和来源，但代理仍难以将基于证据的预测转化为校准的概率。
AI.conclusion: WorldReasoner提供了更全面的评估，揭示了当前代理在时间推理和概率校准方面的局限，有助于推动更真实的世界事件预测研究。

title: Doc-to-Atom: Learning to Compile and Compose Memory Atoms
summary: Long input sequences are central to document understanding and multi-step reasoning in Large Language Models, yet the quadratic cost of attention makes inference both memory-intensive and slow. Context distillation mitigates this by compressing contextual information into model parameters, and recent work such as Doc-to-LoRA amortizes context distillation into a single forward pass that generates one LoRA adapter per document. However, producing a single monolithic adapter for all queries leads to irrelevant-query interference, limited compositional recall, and poor scalability to long-document reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose Doc-to-Atom (Doc2Atom), a compositional parametric memory framework that decomposes each document into semantically typed knowledge atoms. Each atom is compiled into an independent micro-LoRA adapter and a provenance retrieval key. At inference time, a lightweight query router selects and assembles only the relevant atoms into a query-specific adapter, which is then injected into a frozen base model. The entire system is trained end-to-end through a multi-objective distillation framework. Experiments on six diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Doc2Atom outperforms Doc-to-LoRA baselines while reducing the memory cost of document internalization.

AI.tldr: Doc2Atom is a compositional parametric memory framework that decomposes documents into semantically typed knowledge atoms, each compiled into a micro-LoRA adapter and a provenance retrieval key, enabling query-specific adapter assembly via a lightweight router, achieving better performance and lower memory cost than Doc-to-LoRA on long-document QA.
AI.motivation: Long input sequences cause quadratic attention costs; context distillation helps but existing monolithic adapter methods like Doc-to-LoRA suffer from irrelevant-query interference, limited recall, and poor scalability for long-document reasoning.
AI.method: Doc2Atom decomposes each document into knowledge atoms, each atom compiled into an independent micro-LoRA adapter and a retrieval key. At inference, a query router selects and assembles relevant atoms into a query-specific adapter, injected into a frozen base model. The system is trained end-to-end with multi-objective distillation.
AI.result: Experiments on six diverse QA benchmarks show Doc2Atom outperforms Doc-to-LoRA baselines while reducing the memory cost of document internalization.
AI.conclusion: Doc2Atom effectively addresses the limitations of monolithic context distillation by introducing compositional parametric memory, improving both performance and memory efficiency for long-document reasoning.

title: Small Experiments, Cheaper Decisions: A Case Study in Staged Promotion for Micro-Pretraining
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures; 12-hour dual-host micro-pretraining promotion study; source package includes curated ancillary artifacts
summary: Short pretraining runs can reduce experimental cost, but they can also over-promote configurations that only look strong at tiny budgets. We study an auditable staged-promotion protocol for a fixed micro-pretraining runner on two heterogeneous host blocks: Windows A100 and Linux L40S. Starting from twelve prior-screened configurations, we use staged budgets of 2 minutes, 5 minutes, 10 minutes, 60 minutes, and 12 hours, with frozen promotion rules before expensive continuations. The early screens are intentionally treated as unstable: the 5- and 10-minute rankings are host-sensitive, and the eventual 12-hour top-ranked condition is not the mean-best condition at the replicated 10-minute gate. Because seed ranges differ across stages, these changes are operational promotion evidence, not within-seed curves. A replicated 60-minute gate keeps the Staged Factorial Screening bridge reference in the promoted set, where it ranks first in all four 60-minute host-seed cells. In the final 12-hour confirmation package, the bridge condition ranks first in all four host-seed cells across two seeds; the greedy comparator does not meet the frozen 0.010 val_bpb near-equivalence rule; and the cheaper d8/ar48 (depth-8, aspect-48) sentinel does not meet the frozen 0.020 mean-gap rule. The executed 12-hour branch spends 144 GPU-hours, and the full staged protocol records 169.2 training GPU-hours including screening stages. Continuing all four 60-minute candidates would spend 192 GPU-hours, while continuing all nine replicated 10-minute candidates would spend 432 GPU-hours. The latter numbers are accounting counterfactuals for unrun continuations, not evidence that skipped candidates could not have overtaken the reference. The result is a bounded cost-allocation finding, not a claim of global optimality, capacity-normalized superiority, or superiority over adaptive hyperparameter optimization methods.

AI.tldr: 研究了分阶段晋升协议在短预训练运行中的应用，旨在降低实验成本并识别稳健配置。
AI.motivation: 短预训练运行成本低但可能过度推广仅在小预算下表现好的配置，需要可靠的筛选方法。
AI.method: 在Windows A100和Linux L40S上使用固定微预训练运行器，从12个配置开始，通过2分钟、5分钟、10分钟、60分钟和12小时阶段，使用冻结规则进行筛选。
AI.result: 桥参考条件在60分钟和12小时阶段均排名第一，贪婪比较器未通过等价规则，d8/ar48未通过平均差距规则；总GPU小时为169.2。
AI.conclusion: 该协议提供了有界限的成本分配发现，但不声称全局最优或优于自适应方法。

title: SAGE: Answer-Conditioned Uncertainty Targets for Verbal Uncertainty Alignment
summary: Large language models increasingly express uncertainty through natural-language statements, yet these expressions often fail to reflect the model's sampled behavior. We study verbal uncertainty alignment as a distributional calibration problem: the appropriate uncertainty target for a prompt should be estimated from repeated model outputs rather than from an isolated response. However, group rollouts alone are insufficient, since the resulting target must provide a useful training signal. Existing targets only partially satisfy this requirement. We propose SAGE, Semantic-Answer Guided Entropy, a group-level uncertainty target that constructs an answer-conditioned uncertainty geometry over sampled responses. SAGE preserves categorical, numeric, and symbolic answer distinctions while maintaining a smooth and scale-preserving calibration signal. We further apply this target through Group-Uncertainty Preference Optimization, or GUPO, an uncertainty-channel training framework that supervises verbal uncertainty expressions rather than the full response. Experiments across factual, mathematical, and multiple-choice reasoning tasks show improved uncertainty ranking, lower calibration error, and reduced overconfidence.

AI.tldr: 提出SAGE和GUPO方法，有效校准大语言模型的不确定性表达。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型通过自然语言表达不确定性，但常常无法准确反映其采样行为，需要更好的校准方法。
AI.method: 提出SAGE（语义答案引导熵）作为群体级不确定性目标，并结合GUPO框架对不确定性表达进行训练。
AI.result: 在事实、数学和多选题推理任务上，该方法改善了不确定性排名，降低了校准误差，减少了过度自信。
AI.conclusion: SAGE和GUPO能够有效校准大语言模型的不确定性表达。

title: Substrate Asymmetry in User-Side Memory: A Diagnostic Framework
summary: User-side memory in LLMs is typically scored as a single "personalization" capability: given a user's history, is the output more user-aware? We show this aggregate metric hides opposite-direction failures. Memory factorises into at least three orthogonal axes -- behavioral consistency (style, voice), factual presence (recall facts in history), and factual absence (abstain when a fact is absent) -- and no single substrate wins all three. Comparing per-user gamma-LoRA (a small LoRA adapter trained on each user's history; gamma denotes per-user, not per-task) against BGE-large dense top-K retrieval on a controlled 50-user synthetic corpus and a real-data probe (LaMP-3), we find gamma-LoRA decisively wins behavioral style while RAG decisively wins factual absence -- and the same query-projection cells in attention layers 21-35 causally load-bear both effects in opposite directions (zeroing those LoRA weights raises absence-probe TPR by +33 pp and drops presence-probe TPR by 20 pp). On the more heavily RLHF-tuned Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct the asymmetry strengthens, not heals: parametric memory's behavioral advantage collapses while its absence-calibration deficit against retrieval widens -- an alignment tax on parametric user-memory. On real-data LaMP-3, gamma-LoRA underperforms a majority baseline; a 9-condition mitigation sweep diagnoses this as instruction-following collapse, not substrate failure (a 9x2 cross-product shows the eval-time {1..5} logit mask drives main_acc to >=0.995 on every recipe), and the best training-time fix replicates bit-identically on Llama. Finally, substrate-selection routing is question-classification, not calibration: a 110M DistilBERT on the question text alone beats every logit-based router. We contribute the diagnostic framework, the diagnosed real-data negative, the alignment-tax replication, and the routing-as-classification finding.

AI.tldr: User memory in LLMs factorizes into three orthogonal axes (behavioral consistency, factual presence, factual absence) with no single substrate winning all; per-user LoRA wins style, retrieval wins factual absence, and RLHF strengthens the asymmetry.
AI.motivation: To reveal that aggregate personalization metrics hide opposite-direction failures, motivating a factorization of user memory into orthogonal axes.
AI.method: Compared gamma-LoRA (per-user LoRA) vs BGE-large dense retrieval on a controlled synthetic corpus and LaMP-3 real data; used causal intervention and ablation on attention layers; tested routing via classification.
AI.result: gamma-LoRA wins behavioral style, retrieval wins factual absence; attention layers 21-35 causally load both effects oppositely; RLHF-tuned models show stronger asymmetry; gamma-LoRA underperforms majority baseline on LaMP-3 due to instruction-following collapse.
AI.conclusion: User memory is multidimensional; no single method excels on all axes; routing should be treated as question classification; alignment tax on parametric memory exists.

title: External Experience Serving in Production LLM Systems: A Deployment-Oriented Study of Quality-Cost Trade-offs
summary: Production LLM systems accumulate reusable operational experience, but the practical deployment issue is not merely whether such experience can help. It is how different serving strategies trade off quality against online cost under realistic constraints. Injecting external experience can improve task quality, yet it also increases prompt burden, latency, and serving pressure. We study \textit{external experience serving} as a deployment-oriented quality-cost trade-off problem. We evaluate this question in a real production moderation setting, with tool-use and GPQA as supporting contrast tasks that expose different output-cost regimes. We compare no-experience baselines, random experience controls, global prompt injection, and retrieval-based selective injection, and analyze both task quality and serving cost. The results show that, once experience becomes case-dependent, selective retrieval provides a stronger operating point than unconditional global injection. They further show that retrieval quality matters more than simply increasing Top-$K$, and that the same serving policy can exhibit substantially different cost-benefit profiles across short-output and decode-heavy regimes. These findings suggest that external experience is best treated as a selective, cost-aware serving decision rather than as a universal add-on. Overall, in the settings studied here, external experience pays off only when both the serving interface and the task-specific cost structure make its quality gains worth the online cost.

AI.tldr: External experience serving is a deployment-oriented quality-cost trade-off, where selective retrieval outperforms global injection, and cost-benefit profiles vary by output regime.
AI.motivation: Practical deployment of LLMs faces trade-offs between quality gains from external experience and increased cost (prompt burden, latency, pressure).
AI.method: Evaluated in a real moderation setting with tool-use and GPQA tasks; compared baselines, random controls, global injection, and selective retrieval.
AI.result: Selective retrieval provides better quality-cost trade-off than global injection; retrieval quality matters more than Top-K; cost-benefit profiles differ across short and decode-heavy outputs.
AI.conclusion: External experience should be a selective, cost-aware decision, not a universal add-on; it pays off only when quality gains justify cost.

title: RankVR: Low-Rank Structure Perception and Value Recalibration for Robust Composed Image Retrieval
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) constitutes a pivotal paradigm requiring models to perform joint reasoning on reference images and modification texts. However, the prevalence of Noisy Triplet Correspondence (NTC) in large-scale datasets severely constrains model performance. Existing denoising methods either target binary mismatches or rely on scalar-based point-wise estimation, neglecting rich global structural correlations among sample populations and dynamic value variations during training, thereby yielding suboptimal results. This paper identifies two critical unresolved challenges: Global Structural Inconsistency of Semantic Correlations and Hard Sample Discrimination Uncertainty. To address these, we propose RankVR, a framework designed to construct a robust CIR model via global structure consistency and dynamic value perception. Specifically, we introduce the Global Structure Consistency Perception (GSCP) module, which utilizes the Effective Rank of the Correlation Matrix to decouple clean samples from structural noise. By measuring rank difference, GSCP identifies samples disrupting macroscopic semantic symmetry. Furthermore, we develop the Adaptive Semantic Value Calibration (ASVC) module to distinguish high-value hard clean samples. By integrating training potential and reliability, it dynamically quantifies the semantic value of each triplet, ensuring effective utilization of hard samples while suppressing noise characterized by logical conflicts. Extensive experiments on the FashionIQ and CIRR benchmark datasets demonstrate that RankVR significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, validating its superior robustness in noisy environments.

AI.tldr: 提出RankVR框架，通过全局结构一致性和动态值感知解决组合图像检索中的噪声三元组对应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法忽略全局结构相关性和动态值变化，存在全局结构不一致和难样本区分不确定性两个未解决挑战。
AI.method: RankVR包含两个模块：GSCP利用相关矩阵的有效秩分离干净样本与结构噪声；ASVC动态量化每个三元组的语义值，区分高价值难样本并抑制逻辑冲突噪声。
AI.result: 在FashionIQ和CIRR数据集上，RankVR显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RankVR通过全局结构一致性和动态值感知有效提升了CIR模型在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。

title: Knowing When to Ask: Self-Gated Clarification for Hierarchical Language Agents
summary: In hierarchical reasoning, failures often originate at intermediate decision points where the agent commits to a wrong branch without recognizing that it lacks critical information. Rather than treating clarification as an external uncertainty trigger, we propose ACTION-RATING, a formulation that places it inside the agent's action space on a shared ordinal scale with navigation, so that asking competes directly with acting at every decision point and help-seeking becomes observable at intermediate states. Two structurally distinct information-seeking modes emerge from the agent's own ratings: mandatory (no viable branch) and opportunistic (residual uncertainty despite a leading candidate). On Harmonized Tariff Schedule classification (30,000-node taxonomy, three benchmarks, 9~LLMs across 4 families), we observe a regime shift from mandatory to opportunistic clarification, with Information-Seeking Effectiveness (ISE), a local diagnostic defined as the fraction of help interactions followed by a correct next navigation step (not a final-task metric), rising from 50% to 74%. Three diagnostic contrasts fail to reproduce this structure. A separability test shows that the information-seeking pattern (mode split, ISE ranking) persists when answer quality is degraded (-18.8% accuracy), supporting an empirical separation between where an agent seeks help and the quality of the help it receives. Under the controlled answer channel, accuracy gains reach +16.2% at 10-digit; we read this as an upper bound on what better localization could unlock, not a deployment estimate.

AI.tldr: 提出ACTION-RATING，将澄清内化为动作空间的一部分，使询问与导航直接竞争，在分层推理中产生强制性和机会性两种信息寻求模式，显著提升信息寻求有效性（ISE从50%升至74%），并显示寻求模式与答案质量可分离。
AI.motivation: 分层推理中，代理常在中间决策点因缺乏关键信息而误入错误分支，现有方法将澄清视为外部不确定性触发，未能有效内部化。
AI.method: ACTION-RATING将澄清置于代理的离散动作空间中，与导航共享有序尺度，使询问在每个决策点与行动直接竞争；基于代理自身评分衍生出强制性（无可行分支）和机会性（有候选但残留不确定性）两种信息寻求模式。
AI.result: 在30,000节点HS分类任务上，ISE从50%提升至74%；三个诊断对比未能复制该结构；可分离性测试表明，即使答案质量下降18.8%准确率，信息寻求模式仍稳健；受控答案通道下10-digit准确率提升16.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该结构揭示了信息寻求与答案质量的经验分离，准确率增益可视为更好定位能解锁的上限，而非直接部署估计。

title: Organize then Retrieve: Hierarchical Memory Navigation for Efficient Agents
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents struggle with long-horizon tasks due to their inherent statelessness, requiring all task-relevant information to be encoded in growing input contexts. The resulting degraded reasoning quality, increased inference cost, and higher latency necessitate efficient working memory mechanisms. However, existing approaches either rely on lossy compression or similarity-based retrieval, which often fail to capture temporal structure and causal dependencies required for multi-step agentic tasks. In this work, we present HORMA, a Hierarchical Organize-and-Retrieve Memory Agent that organizes experience into a file-system-like hierarchical structure, where summarized entities are linked to the corresponding raw trajectories, enabling efficient access without losing detailed information. HORMA decomposes working memory into two stages: structured memory construction and navigation-based retrieval. The construction module iteratively refines how experiences are structured by distinguishing between failures caused by missing information and those caused by misleading or overloaded context. The navigation module retrieves task-relevant context by traversing the hierarchy using a lightweight agent trained with reinforcement learning to select minimal yet sufficient context, thereby reducing latency along the critical execution path. Across ALFWorld, LoCoMo, and LongMemEval, HORMA improves task performance under constrained context budgets while requiring at most 22.17% of the baseline token usage in long conversation tasks. Compared to existing methods, it consistently achieves better efficiency-performance trade-offs and generalizes effectively to unseen tasks.

AI.tldr: HORMA是一种层次化组织与检索记忆体，通过文件系统层次结构管理经验，提升LLM智能体在长时任务中的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: LLM agents在长时任务中因无状态性导致推理质量下降、推理成本增加和延迟，现有方法无法捕捉时序结构和因果依赖。
AI.method: 提出HORMA，将记忆组织为文件系统层次结构，包含结构记忆构建和导航检索两阶段，构建模块迭代区分失败原因，导航模块使用强化学习训练的轻量级智能体遍历层次结构检索上下文。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、LoCoMo和LongMemEval上，HORMA在受限上下文预算下提升任务性能，长对话任务中最多使用基线22.17%的token。
AI.conclusion: HORMA实现了更好的效率-性能权衡，并有效泛化到未见任务。

title: Bridging the Modality Gap in Forensic Image Retrieval
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures, paper submitted to Elsevier journal
summary: Automated image retrieval plays an increasingly critical role in modern forensic analysis, supporting investigative workflows that rely on efficient comparison of visual evidence. While prior work has focused primarily on developing and optimizing multimodal retrieval systems, limited attention has been paid to evaluating the forensic applicability of these technologies across diverse real-world scenarios. In this study, we present a unified retrieval framework adapted to four key forensic tasks: (1) tattoo image retrieval given a tattoo query image; (2) tattoo retrieval guided by human-expert textual descriptions, modelling the common situation where a witness verbally describes a tattoo; (3) tattoo retrieval from hand-drawn sketches; and (4) face retrieval from forensic face sketches. Our system leverages a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to automatically generate structured textual descriptions for all queries and gallery images, followed by sentence-transformer embedding for text-based comparison. We evaluate retrieval using visual-only embeddings, text-only embeddings and a multimodal fusion strategy that combines text- and image-based similarity scores derived from state-of-the-art visual feature extractors relevant to each task. The fusion of modalities consistently improves retrieval precision and robustness, especially in scenarios where visual information is limited or noisy (e.g., sketches, partial tattoos, or fragmented witness statements). This work highlights the forensic value of a unified multimodal retrieval pipeline and demonstrates how modern MLLMs can operationalize challenging forensic tasks that traditionally rely on manual expert analysis. Our results position multimodal retrieval as a promising tool for supporting investigative workflows involving tattoos, facial composites, and witness descriptions.

AI.tldr: 提出统一多模态检索框架，融合视觉和文本嵌入，提升法医图像检索精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究集中于多模态检索系统优化，缺乏对法医场景真实适用性的评估。
AI.method: 利用多模态大语言模型生成结构化文本描述，结合句子转换器嵌入，并融合视觉与文本相似度分数。
AI.result: 多模态融合显著提升检索精度和鲁棒性，尤其在视觉信息有限或噪声场景（如草图、部分纹身）。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态管路有望支持涉及纹身、面部合成和证人描述的法医调查工作流。

title: Schützen: Evaluating LLM Safety in Bulgarian and German Contexts
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed across professional domains, bringing hard-to-predict risks, including the generation of harmful or disrespectful content. Although substantial progress has been made in developing safety evaluation datasets, existing resources remain overwhelmingly English- and Chinese-centric. This limitation is particularly pronounced when evaluating languages that operate within shared sociocultural, legal, and ethical contexts. To address this gap, we introduce Schützen: a German--Bulgarian safety dataset designed to assess model answerability under risk, covering both a low-resource language (Bulgarian) and a high-resource language (German). Experiments with multilingual and language-specific LLMs reveal pronounced cross-language differences in safety behavior, highlighting the necessity of tailored, region-specific evaluation resources to support the responsible deployment of LLMs in Germany and Bulgaria. Datasets and code are available at . Warning: this paper contains examples that may be offensive, harmful, or biased.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个德语-保加利亚语安全数据集Schützen，用于评估LLM在不同语言下的安全行为，发现显著跨语言差异。
AI.motivation: 现有安全数据集主要集中于英文和中文，缺乏针对共享社会文化、法律和伦理背景的语言评估，特别是低资源语言保加利亚语和高资源语言德语。
AI.method: 构建Schützen数据集，涵盖低资源语言保加利亚语和高资源语言德语；使用多语言和语言特定LLM进行实验评估模型在风险下的可回答性。
AI.result: 实验揭示了跨语言安全行为的显著差异，表明需要针对特定区域的评估资源。
AI.conclusion: 为了在德国和保加利亚负责任地部署LLM，必须开发量身定制的区域特定评估资源。

title: I Understand How You Feel: Enhancing Deeper Emotional Support Through Multilingual Emotional Validation in Dialogue System
comment: This paper has been accepted for presentation at SIGdial Meeting on Discourse and Dialogue 2026 (SIGDIAL 2026)
summary: Emotional validation - explicitly acknowledging that a user's feelings make sense - has proven therapeutic value but has received little computational attention. Emotional validation in dialogue systems can be decomposed into (i) validating response identification, (ii) validation timing detection, and (iii) validating response generation. To support research on all three subtasks, we release M-EDESConv, a 120k English-Japanese multilingual corpus created through hybrid manual and automatic annotation, and M-TESC, a multilingual spoken-dialogue test set. For timing detection, we propose MEGUMI, a Multilingual Emotion-aware Gated Unit for Mutual Integration, that fuses frozen XLM-RoBERTa semantics with language-specific emotion encoders via cross-modal attention and gated fusion. MEGUMI shows superior performance on both the M-EDESConv and M-TESC datasets, both objectively and subjectively. Finally, our EmoValidBench benchmarks of GPT-4.1 Nano and Llama-3.1 8B indicate that current LLMs generate contextually similar and diverse validating responses, but emotional understanding remains a major area for improvement. Project page:

AI.tldr: 针对情感验证在对话系统中的应用，提出多语言语料库M-EDESConv和时机检测模型MEGUMI，实验表明MEGUMI性能优越，但LLM的情感理解仍需改进。
AI.motivation: 情感验证具有治疗价值，但计算语言学关注不足，特提出分解为三个子任务并构建相应资源。
AI.method: 通过混合人工和自动标注构建120k英语-日语多语言语料库M-EDESConv和口语测试集M-TESC；提出MEGUMI模型，融合XLM-RoBERTa语义与语言特定情感编码器。
AI.result: MEGUMI在客观和主观评价上均表现更优；GPT-4.1 Nano和Llama-3.1 8B能生成上下文相似多样的验证响应，但情感理解能力薄弱。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在验证响应生成上取得进展，但情感理解是主要瓶颈，需要进一步研究。

title: GraspLLM: Towards Zero-Shot Generalization on Text-Attributed Graphs with LLMs
summary: Research on Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) has gained significant attention recently due to its broad applications across various real-world data scenarios, such as citation networks, e-commerce platforms, social media, and web pages. Inspired by the remarkable semantic understanding ability of Large Language Models (LLMs), there have been numerous attempts to integrate LLMs into TAGs. However, existing methods still struggle to generalize across diverse graphs and tasks, and their ability to capture transferable graph structural patterns remains limited. To address this, we introduce the GraspLLM, a framework that combines Graph structural comprehension with semantic understanding prowess of LLMs to enhance the cross-dataset and cross-task generalizability. Specifically, we represent node texts from different graphs in a unified semantic space with a frozen general embedding model, on top of which we perform motif-aware contrastive learning across multiple motif-induced adjacency matrices to extract dataset-agnostic structural information. Then, with our proposed optimal contextual subgraph, we extract the most contextually relevant subgraph for each target node and align these subgraphs to the token space of LLM via an alignment projector. Extensive experiments on TAG benchmark datasets spanning diverse domains reveal that GraspLLM consistently outperforms previous LLM-based methods for TAGs, especially in zero-shot scenarios, highlighting its strong generalizability across different datasets and tasks. Our code is available at .

AI.tldr: 提出GraspLLM框架，通过结合图结构理解和语言模型，增强文本属性图上的跨数据集和跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在多样化的图数据和任务间泛化，且捕获可迁移图结构模式能力有限。
AI.method: 使用冻结嵌入模型统一节点语义空间，进行motif感知对比学习提取数据集无关结构信息，通过最优上下文子图对齐到LLM令牌空间。
AI.result: 在多个TAG基准数据集上，GraspLLM一致优于基于LLM的方法，尤其零样本场景表现突出。
AI.conclusion: GraspLLM框架具备强泛化能力，能有效整合图结构和语义信息。

title: LatticeBridge: Rare-Event Sequential Inference for Faithful Structured Sequence Synthesis
comment: 19 pages. Code and benchmark files available at this https URL
summary: Structured sequence generation often requires a model to satisfy several input-derived constraints in a single output. Standard decoding methods may assign high probability to fluent continuations while placing low mass on continuations that realize all required anchors jointly. We study this regime as a rare-event sequential inference problem. LatticeBridge combines a compact prefix language model, instance-compiled surface automata, and a twisted sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) decoder with resampling, multilevel splitting, and a source-support proposal term derived from instance-provided phrases. The constraint representation is compiled from each input instance and does not rely on manually curated lexical classes. On 2,610 attainable validation tasks spanning CommonGen, E2E NLG, and WikiBio, the particle decoder improves exact anchor satisfaction and mean anchor coverage over greedy, beam-filtered, and best-of-k ancestral baselines under a shared proposal model. Since exact anchor satisfaction alone does not rule out unsupported attribute substitutions, the evaluation reports required-anchor coverage, source coverage, source-intrusion diagnostics, overlap, runtime, and particle statistics jointly. The benchmark characterizes the faithfulness-overlap-latency frontier under a fixed proposal model.

AI.tldr: LatticeBridge是一种结合前缀语言模型、实例编译表面自动机和扭曲序列蒙特卡洛解码器的结构化序列生成方法，在多个基准上显著提升锚点满足率和覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 标准解码方法倾向于生成流畅的序列，但难以同时满足所有输入约束，导致约束满足成为稀有事件。
AI.method: LatticeBridge集成紧凑前缀语言模型、实例编译的表面自动机以及带重采样、多层次分裂和源支持提议项的扭曲序列蒙特卡洛解码器，约束表示从每个输入实例自动编译。
AI.result: 在2610个验证任务（CommonGen、E2E NLG、WikiBio）上，粒子解码器在精确锚点满足和平均锚点覆盖率上优于贪婪、波束过滤和best-of-k基线，并报告了忠实性、重叠、延迟等多维指标。
AI.conclusion: LatticeBridge在固定提议模型下实现了更好的忠实性-重叠-延迟权衡，且不依赖手动词汇类，但需注意精确锚点满足可能不排除属性替换，需联合评估覆盖率与侵入诊断。

title: Calibration Drift Under Reasoning: How Chain-of-Thought Budgets Induce Overconfidence in Large Language Models
comment: 31 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Introduces Calibration Drift Under Reasoning (CDUR) with theoretical analysis and preliminary experiments; includes CABStop; code and data available
summary: The ability of large language models (LLMs) to express calibrated uncertainty is important for safe deployment. Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is widely used to improve accuracy and reliability, but its effect on calibration is not fully understood. We show that this picture is incomplete: in some settings, increasing the reasoning budget beyond a task-specific threshold can cause models to become systematically overconfident, assigning high confidence to incorrect answers. We call this phenomenon Calibration Drift Under Reasoning (CDUR) and study it both theoretically and empirically. We define reasoning budget B and analyze conditions under which Expected Calibration Error ECE(B) follows a non-monotonic pattern: it first decreases as reasoning corrects errors, then increases as longer reasoning produces internally consistent but incorrect explanations. We propose a Hypothesis Lock-In model based on autoregressive generation to explain this behavior. We evaluate Llama-3.1-8B and Llama-3.3-70B on 47 reasoning-trap questions across four reasoning budgets and three seeds (1,368 API calls; 574 valid responses). The 8B model shows non-monotonic calibration behavior, while results for the 70B model are limited to baseline evaluation and are inconclusive for budget-dependent effects. We introduce CABStop, a calibration-aware stopping rule that halts reasoning when confidence diverges from an auxiliary accuracy estimate. These results suggest that increasing reasoning depth does not always improve reliability and should be monitored carefully.

AI.tldr: 本文发现链式思维推理在超过一定预算后会导致模型校准性能先升后降，称为校准漂移现象，并提出一种基于校准感知的停止规则（CABStop）来缓解此问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型校准不确定性对安全部署至关重要，但链式思维推理对校准的影响尚未完全理解，现有研究忽略了推理预算增加可能带来的过置信风险。
AI.method: 定义推理预算B，理论分析期望校准误差（ECE）的非单调模式（先降后升），提出基于自回归生成的假设锁定模型解释该行为，在47个推理陷阱问题上评估Llama-3.1-8B和Llama-3.3-70B，引入校准感知停止规则（CABStop）。
AI.result: 8B模型呈现非单调校准行为（ECE先降后升），70B模型仅完成基线评估，预算依赖效应不明确；CABStop能有效停止过度推理，改善校准。
AI.conclusion: 增加推理深度并不总能提升可靠性，甚至可能损害校准，应谨慎监控推理预算。

title: AI Coding Agents Can Reproduce Social Science Findings
summary: Recent anecdotal evidence suggests that AI coding agents can reproduce published findings when provided with original data and code; yet systematic evaluation across social sciences remains limited. Existing evaluation benchmarks are insufficient, either small or conflate agent performance with problems in the reproduction materials themselves, such as code that fails to execute correctly. Here we introduce SocSci-Repro-Bench, a benchmark of 221 tasks spanning four disciplines and 13 substantive domains, constructed from studies whose results are either fully reproducible with available materials or demonstrably non-reproducible due to missing data, allowing us to isolate agents' reproduction capacity. Evaluating two frontier coding agents, Claude Code and Codex, we find that both can reproduce a large share of social science findings, with Claude Code substantially outperforming Codex. These reproduction rates considerably exceed those previously reported for general-purpose LLM-based agents on comparable reproducibility benchmarks. Both agents also perform strongly on a reasoning task requiring identification of underlying research questions, and additional analyses suggest that results are not primarily driven by memorization. Providing the original paper PDF alongside replication materials modestly improves performance but introduces bias on tasks where reproduction is impossible. We also show that agents can be nudged toward confirmatory specification search through subtle prompt framing. Together, these findings suggest that at least some frontier coding agents can serve as reliable executors of computational workflows while underscoring the need for careful benchmarking and prompt design as AI systems assume larger roles in scientific production.

AI.tldr: 提出SocSci-Repro-Bench基准评估AI编码智能体复制社会科学发现的能力，发现Claude Code和Codex表现良好但受提示设计影响。
AI.motivation: 现有评估基准不足，缺乏对AI编码智能体在社会科学复制中能力的系统评估。
AI.method: 构建含221个任务的SocSci-Repro-Bench基准，涵盖可复制与不可复制研究，评估Claude Code和Codex。
AI.result: 两个智能体均能复制大量发现，Claude Code优于Codex；提供PDF提升性能但引入偏见；提示框架可导向确认性搜索。
AI.conclusion: 前沿编码智能体可作为可靠的计算工作流程执行者，但需谨慎设计基准与提示。

title: ISE: An Execution-Grounded Recipe for Multi-Turn OS-Agent Trajectories
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Dataset and code: this https URL
summary: Training capable OS agents requires data that simultaneously captures structured user intents, multi-turn task delegation, and grounded tool execution--properties absent from existing datasets. We propose ISE (Intent -> Simulate -> Execute), a three-stage synthesis paradigm that addresses these gaps jointly. Stage 1 constructs roughly 50000 structured intents via a 4D framework (Persona x Domain x Task x Complexity); after deduplication the pool contains 43956 unique intents and attains a Vendi Score of 61.57 over the entire pool on mpnet-base-v2 embeddings (cosine kernel, q=1). Stage 2 drives multi-turn user-agent interaction through a role-locked user simulator that grounds each user turn in actual execution outcomes, producing 23132 complete trajectories averaging 8.12 user turns and 68.24 total dialogue turns. Stage 3 runs every tool call inside a live, isolated OS workspace, generating authentic failure-recovery dynamics instead of simulated responses. Fine-tuning on ISETrace improves ClawEval pass@1 from 19.3 to 37.7 using Qwen3-8B on agent tool-use tasks with a standard protocol. This result outperforms zero-shot GPT-4o and the larger Qwen3-32B base model which is four times bigger. An ablation on Stage 2 proves multi-turn simulation brings a large portion of the performance gain. We release all source code and dataset at .

AI.tldr: 提出ISE (Intent->Simulate->Execute) 三阶段合成范式，生成结构化用户意图、多轮对话和真实工具执行的训练数据，显著提升OS agent性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集不能同时捕获结构化用户意图、多轮任务委派和工具执行，限制了OS agent的训练。
AI.method: 阶段一：通过4D框架 (Persona x Domain x Task x Complexity) 构造约50000个去重意图 (43956个)。阶段二：使用角色锁定的用户模拟器进行多轮交互，基于执行结果生成23132条轨迹。阶段三：在隔离的OS工作空间中执行每个工具调用，产生真实的失败恢复动态。
AI.result: 基于Qwen3-8B在ClawEval上pass@1从19.3提升至37.7，超越零样本GPT-4o和四倍大的Qwen3-32B。
AI.conclusion: ISE数据合成方法有效，多轮模拟贡献了大部分性能提升，代码和数据集已开源。

title: Evaluating Bias in Phoneme-Based Automatic Speech Recognition Systems: An Analysis of IPA Transcription Models
summary: The popularization of automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems has increased exploration of the demographic biases related to race, age, gender, and accent, often formed from imbalanced training data. Most of these studies focused on standard grapheme-based ASR systems with comparatively little emphasis on phoneme-based systems, such as models that produce International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA) representations. As ASR systems shift toward multilingual support and low-resource language modeling, IPA-based layers serve as a critical, language-agnostic foundation. In this study, we evaluate the performance of two state-of-the-art open-source ASR systems, WhisperIPA and ZIPA, that generate IPA transcriptions across diverse accents and language sources. Our evaluation includes existing multilingual speech corpora and demographically annotated English-language corpora. We measure model performance by comparing model-generated IPA transcriptions against grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) systems using both standard phoneme error rate (PER) and a proposed Soft PER metric that tolerates linguistically similar phoneme substitutions. Our analysis examines how performance varies across languages and demographic groups such as gender, accent, ethnicity, and age, revealing persistent disparities even after accounting for acceptable phonemic variation. These findings provide insight into potential sources of bias and inform the development of more inclusive and linguistically robust phoneme-based ASR systems. Our code and data will be made publicly available to the community.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了两种IPA音素ASR系统在不同语言和人口群体中的性能，发现持续存在的偏见，并提出软音素错误率指标以容忍相似音素替换。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR偏见研究多聚焦于字素系统，而音素系统在多语言场景中日益重要，但其偏见研究不足。
AI.method: 使用WhisperIPA和ZIPA系统，对多语言及带人口统计注释的英语语料库进行音素转录，与G2P系统对比，采用标准PER和提出的软PER指标。
AI.result: 模型性能在不同语言和人口群体（性别、口音、种族、年龄）间存在显著差异，即使考虑可接受的音素变异后仍存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 结果为音素ASR系统的偏见来源提供了洞见，有助于开发更包容和语言鲁棒的模型。

title: Debiasing Without Protected Attributes: Latent Concept Erasure from Textual Profiles
comment: 23 pages, 5 figures, 12 tables. The paper is currently under review
summary: Most fairness research in NLP assumes direct access to protected attributes such as gender, race, or nationality. In practice, however, such information is often unavailable due to privacy constraints, missing metadata, or legal restrictions, even though models may infer it from indirect textual cues. This raises a key question: can debiasing succeed without direct access to sensitive attributes? We propose H-SAL, which performs post-hoc concept and attribute erasure using self-description text as an implicit debiasing signal. To support this setting, we introduce a multi-domain Stack Exchange-based fairness benchmark for helpfulness prediction that includes both explicit and implicit signals, enabling comparison between standard debiasing with protected labels and debiasing without access to sensitive information. Across encoder and decoder-only language models, we find that implicit self-description often matches or outperforms explicit-label-based debiasing. Our results broaden representation-level fairness research and provide a new benchmark for studying debiasing under realistic data constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出H-SAL方法，利用自我描述文本作为隐式信号进行后处理去偏，实验表明其效果与基于显式标签的去偏相当或更优。
AI.motivation: 大多数公平性研究假设可直接访问受保护属性，但实践中属性常因隐私或法律限制不可得，因此探索无直接访问敏感属性下的去偏可能性。
AI.method: 提出H-SAL，通过自我描述文本作为隐式去偏信号进行后处理概念和属性擦除；并构建多领域Stack Exchange公平性基准用于有用性预测，包含显式和隐式信号。
AI.result: 在编码器和解码器语言模型上，隐式自我描述去偏通常匹配或优于基于显式标签的去偏。
AI.conclusion: 结果拓宽了表示层面公平性研究，并提供了研究现实数据约束下去偏的新基准。

title: Detecting AI-Generated Content on Social Media with Multi-modal Language Models
summary: Generative AI has enabled the creation of photorealistic images and videos that are increasingly disseminated on social media, often used for spam, misinformation, manipulation, and fraud. Existing AI-generated content (AIGC) detection methods face challenges including poor generalization to new generation models, reliance on single modalities, and lack of interpretable explanations. We present our pipeline that mitigates these issues by continuously curating diverse multi-modal social media data and training a compact vision-language model for detection and explanation. Our model achieves state-of-the-art detection performance on public benchmarks and demonstrates robust detection and explanation capabilities on internal social media datasets across multiple platforms. We deployed our model for post recommendation on social media platforms and observed positive downstream impacts on user engagement, demonstrating that it is feasible to perform effective AIGC detection in dynamic, real-world social media environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于多模态视觉语言模型的AIGC检测与解释管道，在公共基准和真实社交媒体数据上达到最先进性能，并成功部署在推荐系统中提升用户参与度。
AI.motivation: 现有AIGC检测方法泛化性差、依赖单模态、缺乏可解释性，难以应对社交媒体上的新生成模型和复杂场景。
AI.method: 通过持续策划多模态社交媒体数据，训练一个紧凑的视觉语言模型，同时进行检测和生成可解释性说明。
AI.result: 在公共基准上实现最先进检测性能，在内部多平台社交媒体数据集上展现鲁棒检测和解释能力，部署后用户参与度指标提升。
AI.conclusion: 在动态真实社交媒体环境中进行有效AIGC检测是可行的，且能带来积极的下游影响。

title: Semantic Grading of Written Answers in Low-Resource Language Bangla Using a Fine-Tuned Lightweight Language Model
summary: Bangla is among the world's most widely spoken languages, yet it remains underserved in educational NLP research.
